title: FLAT 40% off on Every Friday, Saturday & Sunday
description:
* Maximum discount capping PKR 15,000 per transaction on HBL World Elite Debit Card.
* Maximum discount capping PKR 10,000 per transaction on HBL World Debit Card, HBL World Business Debit Card & HBL Platinum Credit Card.
* Maximum discount capping PKR 5,000 per transaction on Remaining Cards.
* Campaign Period: During Ramadan (Friday, Saturday & Sunday Only).
* Valid From 27th Feb-2026 onwards till Chand Raat.
* Offer valid on one card per day.
* Offer valid on all HBL Debit & Credit Cards.
* Discount Applicable on Dining & Takeaway.
* The discounts are not valid in conjunction with other special promotions, discount programmes or vouchers defined by HBL or alliance partners.
* The discounts cannot be combined with group discounts, parties, special events or any other offers.
* HBL Cardmembers are entitled to discounts in respect to payments made at the alliance partners through their HBL Cards. This is not applicable in respect to cash transactions.
* HBL will not be responsible for any complaint or liability whatsoever that arises with respect to items and services availed on the mentioned partners.
* HBL reserves the right to terminate or withdraw or change the criteria of any discount offering without providing prior notice or reason.
* HBL is not liable for the accuracy of the brand offers mentioned under alliances. For updated brand offers, please refer to the relevant alliance partner’s website or physical outlet.
sourceEntityDescription: Jahan Khwab Wahan HBL! HBL being the largest bank of Pakistan provides amazing online (internet) banking service along with easy car loan for its customers. Here you can find all the deals and discounts for all HBL Credit and Debit cards including Visa Gold Credit Card, Visa Green Credit Card, Visa Platinum Credit Card, Master Debit Card, Master World Debit Card, Master Titanium Debit Card etc..

title: 50% off on Every Friday & Saturday
description:
* Discount will be valid only on Mastercard World Credit Card on 523819 BIN only
* Max Discount Cap PKR 6,000
* Only one card can be avail discount per day
* Only one card can be charged six times in a month
* The Bank may together with the Alliance Partners, offer discounts from time to time, as part of promotion schemes for the Cardholders. However, the Alliance Partners have full authority to refuse any promotional offers, and the Bank shall not be liable to the Cardholder for any such refusal.
* Only (01) One Discount transaction is allowed on offer day and total (4) Four Discount transactions in a Calendar month per card.
* Split of transactions are not allowed for discount offer.
* Any other discount transaction monitored same day,will be charged back in monthly account statement of customer.
* Bank Offers including Discounts, Promotional Offers, and Incentives that are discretionary, and the Cardholders are not entitled to claim the same as a matter of their right.
* Bank is entitled at any time without any liability to the Cardholder in any manner whatsoever to terminate or withdraw or change the criteria and conditions for these discounts, promotional offers, and incentives. 
* The Cardholders may be entitled to discounts mentioned above in respect to payments made at the mentioned Alliance Partners through their BOP Credit Card /Debit Card. This entitlement is not applicable in respect of cash transactions. 
* The aforementioned discounts are not valid in conjunction with other special promotions, discount programs or vouchers defined by the Bank or Alliance Partners.
* All Discounts, Promotional Offers, and Incentives are subject to the specific category of the card bins (Gold, Platinum, or World). The cardholder of each category will only be able to enjoy the Offers of the card he/she holds and not any other. 
* The terms of our banking agreement apply to each use of a Credit/Debit card. If a cardholder does not agree with those terms, they should not sign the credit card or carry out any transaction. 
* Cardholder accepts the terms of our banking agreement when he/she first use the Debit/credit card.

* Alliance partner Terms & Conditions apply.
